title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.600 - Cadets responsible for property — to constitute guard
text:
172.600.  Cadets responsible for property — to constitute guard. — Cadets shall be individually responsible for all state property issued directly to them, and shall constitute a guard for the safekeeping and preservation of all university property.
(RSMo 1939 § 10844) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9687; 1919 § 11583; 1909 § 11155
